items.title: PHOTOSHOOT & VIDEOSHOOT
items.excerpt:
• 1.5 Hour session

  • Additional hour(s) for $50 per

  • Vertical or horizontal format

  • Performance video, BTS, personality videos, etc.

  • Professionally color graded video

  • You receive all video work that is recorded during the session

  • 48 hour turn around

items.title: LIVE START-UP
items.excerpt:
Ideal if you don’t need your full set captured — just a handful of strong photos and two songs recorded live. And yes, you get to choose which two songs you’d like recorded.

  • 6+ PHOTOS

  • 2 SONGS VIDEO RECORDED

  • LIVE AUDIO/MASTER RECORDING AUDIO SYNC TO LIVE VIDEO

  • 48 HOUR TURN-AROUND TIME

items.title: LIVE SHOWCASE
items.excerpt:
Designed to document your entire live set, with every song captured on video.

  • FULL SET RECORDED (UP TO 6 SONGS)

  • EVENT AUDIO/MASTER RECORDING AUDIO SYNC TO LIVE VIDEO

  • PHOTOS CAN BE ADDED FOR ADDITIONAL COST OF $50

    (WILL RESULT IN ONE LESS VIDEO RECORDING)

  • 48 HOUR TURN-AROUND TIME
